zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Howlet於1500年出生在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親William de Howlett23歲，母親Agnes Deynes20歲。他於1523年與Alice Ales Barnes在英國素福爾可恩哈姆 帕瓦聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年1月14日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Howlet于1500年出生在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲William de Howlett23岁，母亲Agnes Deynes20岁。他于1523年与Alice Ales Barnes在英国素福爾可恩哈姆 帕瓦聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年1月14日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howlet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hewlett
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Howlett  . This surname is also established in Ireland (mainly Tipperary).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Howlet was born in 1500, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, his father, William de Howlett, was 23 and his mother, Agnes Deynes, was 20. He married Alice Ales Barnes in 1523, in St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 14 January 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffol: St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Howlet est né en 1500, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Howlett, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes Deynes, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ales Barnes en 1523, à St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1523 in St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, England Alice Ales Barnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Januar 1555 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Howlet è nato il nel 1500 nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William de Howlett, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Deynes, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Ales Barnes nel 1523, nel St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 14 gennaio 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Bures, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Howletが1500年にイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで生まれた時，父William de Howlettは23歳，母Agnes Deynesは20歳であった。1523年にイギリススフォルクソルンハム パーヴァスト マリ'ス チャーチでAlice Ales Barnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年1月14日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブレスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffol: 영국 수폴크 토른함 파르바 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Howlet(이)가 1500년 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Howlett(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Deynes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1523년 영국 수폴크 토른함 파르바 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Alice Ales Barnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 1월 14일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Howlet nasceu em 1500, em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Howlett, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Deynes, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ales Barnes em 1523, em St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1555, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffol: ст мэри'с чурч, таурнам парва, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Howlet родился в 1500 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Howlett было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Deynes, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ales Barnes в 1523 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, таурнам парва, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 14 января 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Ales Barnes en 1523, en St Mary's Church, Thornham Parva, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas.
